description: Structural guardrail: CLI implementer lanes (codex/grok) must be spawned without a `name` — a named spawn becomes an in-process teammate, which strips the agent's tool whitelist. Fail closed: if no python runtime exists, CLI-lane spawns are denied by the shell layer until it does. Also carries the receipt gate: a Stop hook that blocks claiming completion while a pending codex spec has no complete receipt (fail open without python — it is a ratchet, not the primary guardrail).

hooks.command: payload=$(cat); if command -v python3 >/dev/null 2>&1; then printf '%s' "$payload" | python3 "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/block-named-cli-lane.py"; elif command -v python >/dev/null 2>&1; then printf '%s' "$payload" | python "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/block-named-cli-lane.py"; else case "$payload" in *codex-implementer*|*grok-implementer*) echo 'fable-advisor guardrail: python runtime missing, CLI lane spawns disabled (fail closed) — install python3, or route to the in-house implementer lane' >&2; exit 2 ;; *) echo '{}' ;; esac; fi

payload=$(cat); if command -v python3 >/dev/null 2>&1; then printf '%s' "$payload" | python3 "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/receipt-gate.py"; elif command -v python >/dev/null 2>&1; then printf '%s' "$payload" | python "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/receipt-gate.py"; else echo 'fable-advisor receipt gate skipped: python runtime missing (fail open — the PreToolUse spawn guardrail is the fail-closed line)' >&2; fi
